task: Wire EvoClaw tool loop to auto-log outcomes to RSI SQLite database. In internal/orchestrator/toolloop.go, after Execute() completes (success or failure), automatically write an outcome record to the RSI SQLite DB at ~/.evoclaw/rsi/outcomes.db (same schema as skills/rsi-loop/scripts uses). Fields: task_id, agent_id, session_key, tool_calls_count, parallel_batches, success (bool), error_count, wall_time_ms, timestamp. No agent cooperation needed — fires on every tool loop completion. Add RSILogger interface so it's mockable in tests. Keep zero-value behavior when RSI DB path doesn't exist (graceful no-op). Add Go tests.
